description_long: This object consists of two large, rectangular, military-style green toolboxes stacked on top of each other, with a third, smaller box placed adjacent to them. The surfaces are painted in a dark olive green and show signs of wear, with visible scuffs and chipped paint along the edges, suggesting heavy use. Each box features black metal handles on the sides for carrying, and prominent black metal latches secure the lids. White stenciled markings, including a triangle with the number '39' and Cyrillic text, are visible on the top and sides, giving the boxes an industrial or military surplus appearance. The boxes are constructed from wood, reinforced with metal hardware at the corners and edges. The overall design is utilitarian, with no decorative elements, emphasizing durability and function.
description: A set of rugged, olive green wooden toolboxes with black metal handles, latches, and white stenciled markings, showing signs of heavy use.
description_view_0: Front view showing two stacked toolboxes and a third, smaller box to the right, with visible top markings and latches.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the black metal handles and the thickness of the boxes, with the smaller box in front.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying Cyrillic stenciling and the back sides of the stacked boxes, with the smaller box to the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the handles and the arrangement of the boxes, with the smaller box in the foreground.
attribute_handle_type: Rectangular, fixed black metal handles mounted on the sides of each box, designed for two-handed carrying; no ergonomic padding or folding features.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Black metal clasp latches on the front of each box, simple mechanical type with no visible keyholes or combination locks.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Each box appears to be a single large compartment with a hinged lid; no internal trays or dividers are visible or implied.
attribute_external_labeling: White triangle with '39' stenciled on the top and side
Cyrillic text 'БЧЭ9 N 473609' stenciled on the side
